summary.zh: 平底规则终结了地面效应时代，戈登·默里为新规则设计的楔形布拉汉姆 BT52 搭配宝马涡轮引擎，帮助皮奎特拿下个人第二个世界冠军，也是涡轮引擎的首个车手冠军。
summary.en: The flat-bottom rule ended the ground-effect era; Gordon Murray's wedge-shaped Brabham BT52, paired with a BMW turbo engine, carried Piquet to his second title — the first drivers' championship won with a turbocharged engine.

content.zh: 平底规则终结了地面效应时代，戈登·默里为新规则设计的楔形布拉汉姆 BT52 搭配宝马涡轮引擎，帮助皮奎特拿下个人第二个世界冠军，也是涡轮引擎的首个车手冠军。
content.en: The flat-bottom rule ended the ground-effect era; Gordon Murray's wedge-shaped Brabham BT52, paired with a BMW turbo engine, carried Piquet to his second title — the first drivers' championship won with a turbocharged engine.
